channel.title: Conference on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Conference on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Vitamin D Conference - 6th Minimum, Maximum, Optimum
item.description:
• Introductory lecture: Vitamin D – for health of the individual, does it also influence the public health?
    • Session I. Nutritional rickets
      • Nutritional rickets: an overview
      • Ukrainian recommendations on preventing and treating nutritional rickets
      • Rickets types and treatment with vitamin D and analogues
    • Session II. Updated guidelines for Vitamin D in Poland, 2023
      • General overview and introduction to the main recommendations
      • Guidelines for newborns, premature neonates, infants and pregnant women
      • Guidelines for children and adolescents
      • Guidelines for adult population
      • Guidelines for seniors and oldest olds
    • Special lecture: Why is Germany so conservative in vitamin D recommendations?
    • Session III. Central European and Eastern European Guidelines
      • Fragility, fractures and vitamin D
      • Pleiotropic actions of vitamin D
      • Central and Eastern European Guidelines AD 2022
      • Ukrainian Guidelines in 2023
      • Special lecture: Sources of vitamin D and calcifediol – natural and artificial/man-made: a celebration of the last day of skin synthesis
      • Special lecture: Epigenetic and genomic view on vitamin D: a “celebration” of the first day of autumn / first day of the lack of skin synthesis
    • Session IV. Pleiotropic action of vitamin D (Part 1)
      • Periodontal disease as the canary in the coal mine
      • Vitamin D deficiency and cardiovascular disease: current knowledge
      • 25 Hydroxyvitamin D serum concentration and COVID-19 severity and outcomes – a Romanian experience
      • Vitamin D in endocrine diseases
      • Effect of vitamin D deficiency on trabecular and cortical bone compartments – the 3D DXA modelling approach
      • Relationship of vitamin D deficiency with insulin resistance
      • Risk groups for low vitamin D: changing the paradigm in clinical practice
      • Special Lecture: Calcifediol: a review of its pharmacological characteristics and clinical use in correcting vitamin D deficiency
  • Session V. Pleiotropic actions of vitamin D (Part 2)
      • Vitamin D and brain
      • Vitamin D in overweight and obesity - trivial or significant problem?
      • Assessment of vitamin D deficiency in patients with metabolic syndrome in chronic stress conditions
      • Mitochondria as a target for vitamin D
      • Vitamin D status of patients with diabetic chronic kidney disease and prevention of its progression
      • Session VI. Pleiotropic actions of vitamin D (incl. Young Investigators Session)
      • Extending the vitamin D response index concept based on cohorts from Saudi Arabia
      • Could vitamin D be a Disease-Modifying Antirheumatic Drug (DMARD)?
      • Vitamin D and markers of subclinical inflammation in patients with chronic coronary syndrome
      • In vivo changes of the epigenome of human immune cells after vitamin D challenge
      • Vitamin D status in children and adolescents - data from The Children’s Memorial Health Institute in Warsaw

Introductory lecture: Vitamin D – for health of the individual, does it also influence the public health?

Prof. Andrzej M. Fal (Dept of Allergy, Lung Diseases and Internal Medicine, Central Clinical Hospital, Ministry of Interior, Warsaw, Poland)

item.title: Mortality reduced if Vitamin D levels raised to 30 ng ( Middle East this time) - Grant
item.description:
• Reducing incidence and mortality rates in the UAE and related countries by raising serum 25(OH)D above 30 ng/mL

Reducing incidence and mortality rates in the UAE and related countries by raising serum 25(OH)D above 30 ng/mL

Presented at Vitamin D Conference – 9th Abu Dhabi – Oct 2022

Note by VitaminDWiki: #7 for Saudi Arabia needs Magnesium (none in de-salinated water)

Download the entire PDF from VitaminDWiki

item.title: Vitamin D Conference – 9th Abu Dhabi
item.description:
Conference Brochure as of Oct 8 - on VitaminDWiki

Virtual Conference, Scientific Agenda Oct 7-8 2022  URL

Cost for non-doctors 400 UAE = $110

Note; the following list is from the original, not updated brochure

  • KEYNOTE: Vitamin D and Immunity: Current State of the Field - Prof. Dr. John H. White

  • The role of Vitamin D in respiratory infection - Prof. Peter Kvietys

  • The Relation between Self-Tolerance and Vitamin D through Regulatory T cells (Tregs) Prof. Peter Kvietys Dr. Gianina Elena Statache

item.title: Vitamin D Workshop presentations and posters
item.description:
Full program PDF

      • Presentations
      • Plenary Posters

Presentations

  • George Georgiou (UT-Austin) - Molecular level decomposition of the identity, dynamics and function of the constituent antibodies comprising the serum antibody repertoire in response to infection or vaccination.

  • John White (McGill University) Recent updates on the role of vitamin D signaling in innate and adaptive immunity.

  • Lori Plum (University of Wisconsin, Madison) Antibody production does not require vitamin D or its receptor.

item.title: Vitamin D Workshop in Austin Texas - Sept 6-9 2022
item.description:
Abstacts will be listed after June 1

24th since 1973 (none in 2020 and 2021?)

item.title: Vitamin D Workshop sessions
item.description:
Vitamin D Workshop Oct 13-14

      • Calcium and Bone
      • Immunity and Infectious Disease (COVID)
      • Norman Award Winners
      • Horst Award Winners - Flash Talks
      • Metabolic Diseases
      • Cancer Biology
      • Non-Classical
      • Vitamin D Metabolism and Methods
      • Development and Life Course

Welcoming Remarks (7am Denver/Mountain Time Start)

JoEllen Welsh, State University of New York at Albany, USA James C. Fleet, University of Texas at Austin, USA

Calcium and Bone

(7:05am Denver/Mountain Time Start)

  • Sylvia Christakos, Rutgers New Jersey Medical School, USA JoEllen Welsh, State University of New York at Albany, USA

Philip R. Fischer, Mayo Clinic, USA

item.title: High-dose vitamin D improves health (presentation)
item.description:
High-dose Vitamin D Supplementation Improves Health (Presented in Rome, August 30, 2021)

IV International Vitamin D Mediterranean Congress Grand hotel Flora, Rome

Dr. Grant

Some of the titles

  • In June some Europeans get more solar UVB than others. In December no European gets enough UVB to make vitamin D.

  • Solar UVB as a Source of Vitamin D

  • Breast Cancer Mortality Rates, 1995-77 [Garland, 1992]

  • VITAL Vitamin D RCT, Harvard [Manson, NEJM, 2019]

item.title: Vitamin D Conferences in 2021
item.description:
IV International Vitamin D Mediterranean Congress - Rome, 30-31 August 2021

9.30 Opening Lecture - Chair: S. Minisola

“Vitamin D in 2021” - M.F. Holick

Session I: Preclinical data Chair: A. Teti

  • Histological aspects of vitamin D insufficiency and deficiency - A. Corsi

  • Vitamin D receptor polymorphism among Emirati females: exploring the link with osteoporosis in the context of genomics and biomechanics - F. Ai Anouti

  • Update on the role of vitamin D in intestinal health - H. Fakhoury

item.title: Controversies and consensus in Vitamin D – 3rd Conference
item.description:
Controversies in Vitamin D: A Statement From the Third International Conference

F1

T1

T2

F3 _

The many topics not discussed include

  1. % activation of vitamin D in the cells rather than in the liver & kidneys

  2. When are loading doses better than daily

  3. The many months to plateau the response to a new supplementation level

  4. Efficacy of other forms for Vitamin D, such as nanoemulsion

    • Including gut-friendly forms of vitamin D

  5. Higher Vitamin D thresholds for some diseases

item.title: Treat autoimmune diseases with high-dose vitamin D – Germany online Aug 24, 25 2019
item.description:
Free registration for Online Event

Presentations (some % are re-runs of 2018)
Overview autoimmune diseases Prof. Dr. King, Magdeburg
Vitamin D and Immune System (ENGLISH - repeat of 2018) Dr. Holick, Boston - USA
Vitamin D receptor functions and vitamin D sensitivity Prof. Dr. Carlsberg, Kuopio - Finland
High doses vitamin D therapy - Protocol and results
(ENGLISH - ((Vitamin D has treated Multiple Sclerosis and autoimmune diseases for 16 years – Coimbra April 2018		 repeat of 2018)) )
Implementation of Coimbra protocol for patients Chr. Kiening, Gräfelfing
Autoimmune diseases and the second evolution of man Prof. Dr. med. Spitz, Schlangenbad / Wiesbaden
Integrative therapy for autoimmune diseases Prof. Dr. Ionescu, Neukirchen
Autoimmune diseases of the skin Prof. Dr. Amon, Hohenstadt
Therapeutic alternatives in autoimmune diseases Dr. Lemke, Heidelberg
Laboratory methods for autoimmune diseases PD Bender, Munich
Micronutrients in autoimmune diseases Uwe Gröber, eating
Hashimoto’s thyroiditis as autoimmune systemic disease Prof. Dr. Schomburg, Berlin
Eco-Psychosomatics: The influence of the forest on our immune system Dipl.-Ing. Arvay, Vienna - Austria
Stress and autoimmunity Prof. Dr. med. Wolf, Ulm
Physical activity and immune system Dr. Dr. Rooms, Cologne
Autoimmune diseases of the bowel / fecal; transplantation Dr. Vehreschild, Cologne
The effect of singing and music on the immune system Dipl.-Psych. Wunnenberg, Scheidegg
Omega 3 fatty acids in autoimmune diseases Dr. med. Schmiedel, Baar - Switzerland
Synopsis and Prospects Prof. Dr. med. Spitz, Schlangenbad

Registration gives the following

  • Continuous streaming access to lectures with all bonus materials

item.title: Vitamin D Workshop in Australia - canceled due to COVID
item.description:
[https://vitamindworkshop.org/australia-2020

PLANNING FOR NEXT MEETING IS ON HOLD (March 25, 2020)

PLEASE NOTE the Covid-19 pandemic has impacted planning for the 2020 Vitamin D Workshop. Australia has prohibited flights in/out of the country until the end of May and also banned large gatherings for 6 months. It is therefore impossible for the August conference to proceed as planned. The involved societies (VDW, ANZBMS and MEPSA) are conferring with the meeting planner ASN and the Gold Coast Convention Center to explore options for postponement, although cancellation is also a possibility.

item.title: VitaminDWiki had a booth at Vitamin D Workshop
item.description:
25 charts shown at the booth - some are text which are updated and translatable

Download all 25 original charts

Details at VitaminDWiki page

Function will be available for all categories on VitaminDWiki in by Aug 2019

Details at VitaminDWiki page

Details at VitaminDWiki page

Details at VitaminDWiki page

Details at VitaminDWiki page

Details at VitaminDWiki page

item.title: Review of “Vitamin D - Minimum, Maximum, Optimum” conference of 2017
Vitamin D congress on pregnancy and childhood diseases
item.description:
Two days of Vitamin D presentations in Frankfort Germany

25% of presentations in English with German subtitles

Streaming video – some the video was pre-recorded

Costs 50 € - 268 € to attend the event and ask questions of the presenters . But basically sold out

Videos will also be available for purchase after the conference

   - perhaps the English presentations will be able to be purchased separately

Website: www.spitzen-praevention.com

Talks - primarily in German

item.title: Highlights of Vitamin D Workshop of
item.description:
Highlights from the 21st Workshop on Vitamin D in Barcelona, May 2018

Journal of Steroid Biochemistry and Molecular Biology, https://doi.org/10.1016/jjsbmb.2019.03.026 Published April 2019

Next Vitamin D Workshop New York, May 2019

Founder of VitaminDWiki expects to attend 2019 Workshop and may be permitted to make 2 presentations

  • AI: Exciting opportunity for Vitamin D Researchers

  • VitaminDWiki: Your Go-To Vitamin D Website - 2019

Download the PDF from Sci-Hub via VitaminDWiki

item.title: International Conference on Vitamin D Deficiency – 8th Abu Dhabi
item.description:
Schedule for April 12 2019

“The World’s largest conference on Vitamin D”

  1. Vitamin D and Adolescents’ Health

  2. Low Protein Diet and Vitamin D Supplements in Chronic Kidney Disease (CKD) Patients

  3. Vitamin D and Liver Diseases: Update and Overview

  4. New Insights into the Role of Vitamin D in the Immune System

  5. Vitamin D Deficiency Rickets in Children: Not a Disease from the Past

  6. Difficult Diagnoses in Rickets

  7. Vitamin D Deficiency in Riyadh: A Decade of an Epidemic (2008-2018)

item.title: Vitamin D Workshop in New York
item.description:
Workshop 2019

CROWNE PLAZA TIMES SQUARE, 1605 BROADWAY, NYC

Henry Lahore, founder of VitaminDWiki,
is going again, submitted abstracts for 2 talks

  • AI: Exciting opportunity for Vitamin D Researchers - not accepted

  • VitaminDWiki: Your Go-To Vitamin D Website - 2019 - not accepted for talk

    • VitaminDWiki had a booth at Vitamin D Workshop May 2019
      • Vitamin D is treating and preventing Leprosy in Myanmar
      • Some interesting posters
      • Sesson Ii
      • Sesson III
      • Sesson IV
      • Sesson VI
      • Sesson VII
      • Sesson VIII
      • Sesson IX
      • Sesson XI & XII

Vitamin D is treating and preventing Leprosy in Myanmar

Met a retired doctor at workshop. Have made a webpage for documenting her time and effort

item.title: International Congress on Vitamin D (VitaminD Workshop) – NY
item.description:
2019 details

Vitamin D Workshop in New York – May 2019 on VitaminDWiki

Workshop has been held since 1973

Some previous Workshops

  • 21st Workshop on Vitamin D - Spain May 2018

  • 2017 Worksup summary by Grassroots Health

  • Vitamin D Workshop - Boston March 2016
